body:
desireandruin:

Hey, this is K and this is my main blog. I kind of post whatever I want here, but it’s mainly gonna be a whole lot of reblogs, random horny thoughts, and lesbian yearning. 18+ only, obviously. If we’re mutuals dm me! I’d love to chat & make some friends.

If you wanna see my domme side blog: @ruinanddesire
